message:
chore(conformance): refresh errno edge report — 17 -> 10 failing cases

Regenerates errno_edge_report.v1.json after the continued harness work
on top of ff8a956a. Aggregate motion is purely positive:

  covered_edge_cases    1296 -> 1303  (+7)
  failing_edge_cases      17 -> 10    (-7)
  execution_error_cases   17 -> 10    (-7)
  symbols_with_failures    2 -> 1     (-1)

The seven cases that flipped from execution_error to covered are
follow-on wins from the multi-arg sscanf + length-modifier dispatch
landed in 54df9ea1 — once their conformance rows started executing
through the matrix path, the errno edge sweep picked them up too.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
